content:
**PAD** and **anti-PAD** are comparable to **matter** and **antimatter**. If matter and antimatter lives separately in their containments, everything is perfectly normal. But when mixed together, only one word can be used to describe the consequence -- _annihilation_. Not to mention that antimatter usually appears briefly (meaning disappears quickly) while matter seems to be in existence for quite a long period of time.

Just a random thought. :)
